description: Product description Hanging scented wardrobe dehumidifier by Kingfisher Home. Available in Rose, Lavender and Fresh Linen scents, pack of 3. Safety Warning May cause allergic reactions in individuals sensitive to Rose, Lavender, or Fresh Linen. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Do not ingest. Dispose of responsibly.
